subcodes.first_line: The Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto them who have attained unto the Days of God and have quaffed the pure wine of utterance from the hands of their Lord's mercy [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لمن فاز بایام الله و شرب رحیق البیان من ایادی رحمه ربه
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
